title: Section 22
content: No court, inferior to that of 1[a Metropolitan Magistrate or a Judicial Magistrate of the first class] shall try any offence under section 3, section 4, section 5, section 6, section 7 or section 8.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 46 of 1978, s. 16, for "a magistrate as defined in clause (c) of section 2" (w.e.f. 2-10-1979).
